infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Flow Guru uses speech recognition and the microphone to let you talk to your assistant.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Flow Guru uses the microphone to listen to your commands.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Flow Guru uses your location to provide accurate weather and traffic information.

plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow Flow Guru to use your location for background assistant updates.
